name: UptimeRobot
description: Monitor website and server uptime with HTTP, keyword, ping, port, and heartbeat checks. Get uptime ratios, response times, downtime logs, and SSL certificate status. Useful for agents that need to check if services are online, investigate downtime events, or manage monitoring infrastructure.

capabilities.name: get_monitors
capabilities.description: List and search monitors with their current status, uptime ratios, response times, and downtime logs. Filter by type (HTTP, keyword, ping, port), status (up, down, paused), or search by name. Returns SSL certificate info when available.

capabilities.name: create_monitor
capabilities.description: Create a new uptime monitor for a URL, IP, or port. Configure monitor type (HTTP, keyword, ping, port, heartbeat), check interval, timeout, alert contacts, and keyword matching. Supports HTTP authentication and custom headers.

capabilities.name: manage_alert_contacts
capabilities.description: Create, list, edit, and delete alert contacts that receive notifications when monitors go down or recover. Supports email, SMS, webhook, Slack, Telegram, Microsoft Teams, and other notification channels.

capabilities.name: manage_maintenance_windows
capabilities.description: Create, list, edit, and delete maintenance windows during which monitoring is paused for specified monitors. Define start time, duration, and recurrence to prevent false alerts during planned maintenance.
